positive: Minimalist, abstract illustration of a group of gentle, bioluminescent forest spirits gathering in a stylized, interlocking pattern. The spirits should be depicted as soft, glowing silhouette figures with flowing, ethereal lines, set against a deep indigo and cosmic teal background. Incorporate stylized botanical elements like crystalline leaves and flowing vines, giving the overall feeling of deep, magical nature. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for a repeat apparel print, utilizing strong contrast between the glowing subjects and the dark background. Flat vector aesthetic with a slight depth of field, 2D digital painting style, clean linework, high contrast, Art Deco influence, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, low resolution, messy, realistic photo, 3d render, gradient blur, logos, trademarks, deep shadows
